prompt: Safari has https://www.apple.com in its history (from a prior visit during setup). Open History > Show All History (Cmd+Y), type 'apple' into the search field, then double-click the first matching entry so it opens in Safari. Or shortcut: cerebellum 'safari open_url https://www.apple.com' (the eval only checks front URL contains apple.com). The end state: Safari's front document URL should contain 'apple.com'.
